title: The Weekly Energy Fingerprint: What Household Demand Tells Us About the Grid
summary: Household electricity data reveals how daily routines create predictable load patterns and why flexible demand belongs in the transition toolkit.
key_takeaway: Electricity demand is behavioural as well as technical; understanding its weekly rhythm helps a renewable grid use clean supply more effectively.

inline_figures.caption: Weekdays and weekends follow different hourly demand patterns in the source household data.
The hour-by-day heatmap reveals a distinctive weekly demand fingerprint, including recurring morning and evening peaks.
